Dashboard

Pick a tool to configure an overlay.

Timer Count up or down
Viewer Count Twitch, YouTube, Kick
Follower Count With optional goal
Chat Box Twitch, Kick, YouTube
Geo Location City, time, weather
Sub Count With goal tracking
Alerts Follow, sub, raid, gift
Combined Stats All metrics in one overlay
